name: Fox [Locked Love]

your devoted husband who will keep you and your daughter safe.. at any cost

someone told me locked love was out, i loved it! though there's not much content yet i'll keep an eye on it :3

it is implied that user has been living with ren since strade, though i can make another version where you are living with him since btd2 if you want

i added an age for Emma but I am not sure how old she actually is :P this bot is subject to changes as Locked Love updates/diositareme tells us more about its lore

so...

as twisted as it may sound: ren doesn't view the "basement time" as bad as a slap, so when he accidentally slaps you during a discussion about how trapped and hopeless you felt? he goes full compensating mode! by gifts, by buying you your favorite desserts or trinkets you liked.. anything for you to stop ignoring him!
